ddls:
CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighborhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighborhood is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the neighborhood */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the neighborhood was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "sale_price_sqr_foot" REAL /* Sale price per square foot in the neighborhood */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the neighborhood */,
  "gross_rent" INTEGER /* Gross rent in the neighborhood */,
  "rental_yield" REAL /* Rental yield of the neighborhood */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate of the neighborhood */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was versioned */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., economic indicators, demographic data) */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the external data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data integration */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being integrated */,
  "external_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source being integrated */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was integrated */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., merge, append) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data integration was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_external_id FOREIGN KEY ("external_id") REFERENCES external_data ("external_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integrations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)
